/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/s3-storage-test.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/s3-storage-test.dir/tests/s3_storage_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/s3-storage-test.dir/src/storage/S3Storage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/s3-storage-test.dir/src/config/config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/s3-storage-test.dir/src/ffmpeg/CommandRunner.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/s3-storage-test.dir/src/utils/FileUtils.cpp.o" -o s3-storage-test
